documentation.description: Indicates type of the next token.

simple_types.name: token_type
simple_types.code: type token_type is (Word, quoted_string, Comment, Number, Error, Missing);

documentation.description:
Print error messages for number.
    m - Module name, printed in front of message
    v - Value name, printed at end of message
  The error message is of the format:
  <m>: Error in number for <v> (if t = Error)
  <m>: Missing number for <v>  (if t = Missing)
  No message for other values of t.

subprograms.name: nextDecValue
nextHexValue

documentation.description: Interpret the next token as an unsigned decimal number.

subprograms.name: numErr
subprograms.code: procedure numErr(t : token_type; m : String; v : String)

subprograms.name: split

documentation.description: Interpret the next token as an unsigned hexidecimal number.

Split on whitespace.  String is passed in in "rest".  The next
  token is returned in "first" and "rest" is updated to have that
  token removed.
